links.context_text: Functional knit interlock polyester fabrics.

product_page.title_descriptor: Polyester Fast Dry Interlock Knit Fabric
product_page.page_title: Polyester Fast Dry Interlock Knit Fabric - ArSport Dry - Ariteks
product_page.spec_line: 140 g/m², 100% Polyester Fast Dry, Interlock Knit Fabric
description_blocks: ArSport Dry is 100% Channeled Polyester interlock knit fabric for team uniforms. The special channeled poliester fiber gives fast dry function to the fabric. To reduce to odor formation the fabric is coated on two side by antibacterial agents.
It is suitable for sublimation printing.

140 g/m² , 100% Polyester Fast Dry, Interlock Knit Fabric

ArSport Dry is 100% Channeled Polyester interlock knit fabric for team uniforms. The special channeled poliester fiber gives fast dry function to the fabric.
